details: Compound 10l: mp 151-153 °C confirmed in experimental section. Q1 PASS (compound/value/units match). Q2 PASS (melting_point — bare value, no decomp). Q3 PASS (measured). Q4 PASS (DOI 10.1186/s13065-025-01402-8 maps to paper file in corpus).
Compound 14 (N-(2-Fluorobenzyl)-6-chloro-4-hydroxy-2-quinolone-3-carboxamide): m.p. 255–258 °C confirmed in Section 4.2.9. Q1/Q2/Q3/Q4 all PASS.

Table 1 row 6: diMeMEA salt T_peak = 111 °C. Compound name 'Diclofenac N,N-dimethyl-monoethanolamine salt' = diMeMEA. Property DSC_peak is correct (T_peak column header = peak of salt melting endotherm in DSC). Q1/Q2/Q3/Q4 PASS.
Compound 6d (11-(tert-Butylamino)-12-(4-chlorophenyl)-9H-benzo[f]pyrrolo[1,2-d][1,2,3]triazolo[1,5-a][1,4]diazepine-13-carbonitrile): mp 89-92 °C. Q1/Q2/Q3/Q4 PASS.
Compound 6 (Diethyl ((E)-4-((Adamantan-1-yl)amino)-4-oxobut-2-en-1-yl)phosphonate): Mp 115–118 °C confirmed in Section 3.1.4. Q1/Q2/Q3/Q4 PASS.
Compound 8d: 'Base 8d was obtained in 58% yield, m.p. 154-156°C (methanol)' confirmed. Q1/Q2/Q3/Q4 PASS.
Compound 6b: M.p. 234-236 °C confirmed in experimental section. Q1/Q2/Q3/Q4 PASS.
Compound 5m: mp 200–202 °C confirmed. Q1/Q2/Q3/Q4 PASS.
Compound 4c: mp 150 °С (dec). Property correctly classified as decomposition (per disambiguation: 'X °C, decomp.' → decomposition). Q1/Q2/Q3/Q4 PASS.
Compound 39: Mp > 270 °C confirmed in Section 3.1.6. Relation '>' correctly captured. Q1/Q2/Q3/Q4 PASS.

Compound 5 (1-(2-(Benzyloxy)-4-methylphenyl)ethan-1-one): mp 55–56 °C confirmed. Tier-1 Q1/Q2/Q3/Q4 PASS. Note: evidence_quote shows '2 g of white crystals (89%)' but paper actually says '6.2 g'; this is a Tier-2 verifiability deviation only (yield/mass mismatch), value/units/compound all correct.
Compound 4i (Ethyl (E)-8-(2-(4-methoxyphenyl)-2-oxoethylidene)-2,3-dimethyl-4,7-dioxo-...-6-carboxylate): m.p. 253-254 °С (acetonitrile). Q1/Q2/Q3/Q4 PASS.
Compound 2 (2-Ethoxycarbonylamino(β-hydroxyethyl)benzamide): m.p. 120-121 °C confirmed. Q1/Q2/Q3/Q4 PASS.
Compound 6b (2-Ethoxy-3-(4-aminophenyl)quinazolin-4-one): m.p. 105–106 °C confirmed. Q1/Q2/Q3/Q4 PASS.
Compound 4d (1,1'-(Pentane-1,5-diyl)bis{3-[(3,5-dimethyladamantan-1-yl)methyl]urea}): mp 127.1 °C confirmed in experimental section and Table 1. Q1/Q2/Q3/Q4 PASS.

Compound 1i (Cl, 3,4-Cl2 in Table): mp 189-190 °C confirmed in Table 1. Compound name '6-chloro-3-(3,4-dichlorophenyl)-2,2-dimethyl-1,2-dihydroquinazoline-4(3H)-thione' matches 1i (X=Cl, R=3,4-Cl2). Q1/Q2/Q3/Q4 PASS.

Compound 4t ((E)-2,5-dioxo-1-(2-oxo-2-phenylethylidene)-1,2,4,5,7,8,9,10-octahydro-6H-cyclohepta[4,5]thieno[3,2-e]pyrrolo[1,2-a]pyrimidine-3-carbonitrile): m.p. 284-285 °С (acetonitrile). Q1/Q2/Q3/Q4 PASS.
Compound 2b (Methyl N-[4'-methylphenylsulphonyl-2-phenylglycyl]anthranilate): m.p. 155°C confirmed. Q1/Q2/Q3/Q4 PASS.

2-((6-Chloro-1,2,4,5-tetrazin-3-yl)amino)-N-(2-(3-methoxyphenoxy)phenyl)acetamide: m.p. 166–169 °C (iPrOH) confirmed. Paper labels compound 3f (CSV evidence_location says 'compound 5' which is a label-numbering deviation but compound identity by name is correct). Q1/Q2/Q3/Q4 PASS.
Compound 18 (5-(Coumarin-3'-yl)-1,2,4-triazolo[4,3-a]pyrimidine): mp 252°C confirmed. Q1/Q2/Q3/Q4 PASS.
Compound 20 (N-(3-(Trifluoromethyl)benzyl)-6-chloro-4-hydroxy-2-quinolone-3-carboxamide): m.p. 248–251 °C confirmed in Section 4.2.15. Q1/Q2/Q3/Q4 PASS.

[Glu(O sec-Bu)2][HCl]: Table 2 T_onset = 181.5 °C. T_onset defined in paper as 'onset temperature of the thermal degradation' (TGA), correctly classified as decomposition (per rule: TGA onset → decomposition, NOT DSC_onset). Q1/Q2/Q3/Q4 PASS.

Cholesterol (compound 1, Fluka reagent recrystallized from methanol): m.p. 148-150 °C confirmed. Q1/Q2/Q3/Q4 PASS. Paper spelling 'Cholestrol' is a typo in source; standard name in CSV is appropriate.
Compound 4e (Methyl ... -dispiro[imidazo[4,5-e]thiazolo[3,2-b][1,2,4]triazine-6,3'-pyrrolidine-2',3''-indoline]-4'-carboxylate): mp 260–261 °C, yield 527 mg (77%). Q1/Q2/Q3/Q4 PASS.

3-hexanol, Table 5 row 18: BP (Exp.) = 135.4 °C; this is the experimental boiling point compiled from CRC Handbook [22]. Property boiling_point correct. meas_calc=measured PASS (review-paper compilation rule). Q1/Q2/Q3/Q4 PASS.
